list.title: Trips
list.description: View and manage all your trips

empty.title: No trips found
empty.description: There are no trips available at the moment. Check back later.

details.title: Trip Details
details.noStationsYetDescription: The agency manager has not yet configured the stations for this trip.
details.noBookingsDescription: There are no bookings available at the moment. Check back later.

create.title: Add New Trip
create.description: Fill in the details below to create a new trip.
create.addMinStations: Add at least 2 stations to create a trip
create.departureTimeAfterPrevious: Departure time must be after the previous station.

edit.title: Update Trip
edit.description: Fill in the details below to update trip details.
edit.confirmDescription: Are you sure you want to update this trip with {count} stations?

delete.title: Are you absolutely sure?
delete.description: This action cannot be undone. This will permanently delete the trip and all associated data.
